Description: (Required) The title of the event. This value must be unique. For repeating events, use the title of the event series followed by the date to make this value unique.
The date when the event occurred.
The overall or average rating (0-5) for the event provided by the attendees.
List of people who pre-registered for the event, excluding walk-ins.
List of even attendees, if available.
If checked, the # of registrants and # of attendees will be auto-calculated using their corresponding columns. If unchecked, you can specify a value manually and it will not get overridden.
The approximate number of pre-registered participants, excluding walk-ins.
The approximate number of attendees, including walk-ins, guests, and those joining by phone.
List of presenters / speakers.
List of vendors used in this event. Must exist in the People list first.
The physical location of the event, if applicable.
The URL to the webpage or announcement for the event.
Link to the shared folder or shared drive where event files are stored (e.g. agenda, program, slides, etc.)
Link to video recording (or playlist), if available. For individual videos, use the video's "Share" button to get the link. For playlists, right-click "Play All" and copy the link.

Description: The total internal cost (expenses that come from the center's budget). This excludes any portions paid by others.
The total cost incurred to host this event, including the center's and other's portions.
The public description or summary for this event.
Additional notes, comments, links, or important remarks.
The research area focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
The research methodology and applications focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
The population focus for this event, from the center's pre-defined taxonomy.
Custom tags and keywords for searching.
The event date formatted as "yyyy-mm mmmm" (e.g. 2025-01 January, 2026-12 December). This field can be used to facilitate sorting.
The fiscal year when this event took place (7/1 - 6/30).
The year when this event took place.
